details.label: Description
details.value: Open common areas within the community. Residents may plant trees and shrubs on their site with prior written approval from the office.

details.label: Description
details.value: Playground equipment is provided for the children of park residents.

details.label: Supervision
details.value: Parents and guardians are asked to supervise their children and stress safety.

details.label: Wading Pools
details.value: Small wading pools (max 6' x 12" deep) are allowed on a patio/cement pad.

details.label: Sandboxes
details.value: Allowed up to 4' x 4' on a patio/cement pad.

details.label: Note
details.value: Swing sets are not allowed on individual home sites.

details.label: Description
details.value: One domesticated pet per household is welcome with written approval from the office.

details.label: Pet Rent
details.value: $25 per month.

details.label: Probation
details.value: Approved pets have a 90-day probation period.

details.label: Registration
details.value: Pets must be registered with the office, with proof of rabies vaccination and any shots required by law; a current rabies tag must be worn if required.

details.label: Leash
details.value: Pets must be on a leash any time they are outside your home or off your site.

details.label: Cleanup
details.value: Owners must clean up after their pets daily, on the site and throughout the park.

details.label: Note
details.value: Service animals under Michigan law are not considered pets. Fenced enclosures, dog houses, and "Beware of Dog" signs are not permitted.

details.label: Description
details.value: A friendly on-site team is here to help with day-to-day needs.

details.label: Services
details.value: Maintenance, approvals, and site inspections.

details.label: Emergencies
details.value: Each resident keeps an emergency contact on file with the office.

details.label: Notices
details.value: Rule-violation notices are issued in writing with time to correct.

details.label: Description
details.value: Designated parking is provided throughout the community.

details.label: Spaces
details.value: Park only in designated spaces, not on lawns, streets, vacant sites, or patios. Double parking is not permitted.

details.label: Vehicle Size
details.value: Vehicles with a load capacity over three-quarter ton are not kept or stored in the park.

details.label: Speed & Signs
details.value: Posted speed limits and traffic signs must be obeyed. No parking within 10 feet of fire hydrants.

details.label: Description
details.value: Approved storage options to keep your homesite neat.

details.label: Sheds
details.value: One shed per site, maximum 10' wide x 10' deep x 8' high, on a cement pad, with written approval from the office.

details.label: RV / Recreational Storage
details.value: Storage for items like trail bikes, ATVs, and snowmobiles may be allocated to residents for a monthly fee based on the space needed.

details.label: Description
details.value: Mail service close to home.

details.label: Keys
details.value: Mailbox keys are provided with a $25 deposit. There is a $25 charge for lost keys.

details.label: Description
details.value: A community clubhouse for residents and their guests. Coming soon.

faqs.question: What are the community rules?
faqs.answer: Our community guidelines keep the neighborhood safe, quiet, and well-kept for everyone. You'll get a full copy of the rules during your tour, covering upkeep, parking, guests, and quiet hours.

faqs.question: What fees should I expect?
faqs.answer: Alongside your home payment or rent, there's a monthly lot rent that covers your homesite and shared amenities. We'll walk you through every cost up front, with no surprises.

faqs.question: How does the water meter work?
faqs.answer: Each home has its own meter, so you only pay for the water you use. Readings are simple and billing is clearly itemized each month.

faqs.question: What's the pet policy?
faqs.answer: We're a pet-friendly community and love four-legged neighbors. A few breed and size guidelines apply, and there's plenty of green space for walks.
